meaning: large area; (fig.) (of a problem) (occurring) on a massive scale
sentence: 暴雨导致大面积停电。
pinyin: Bàoyǔ dǎozhì dà miànjī tíngdiàn.
english: The heavy rain caused widespread power outages.

meaning: old man; I (an old man referring to himself)
sentence: 村口那个老汉每天早起锻炼。
pinyin: Cūn kǒu nàge lǎohàn měitiān zǎo qǐ duànliàn.
english: The old man at the village entrance exercises early every morning.

meaning: stretch of road; section of a highway or railway
sentence: 这段路段正在施工，请绕行。
pinyin: Zhè duàn lùduàn zhèngzài shīgōng, qǐng ràoxíng.
english: This section of road is under construction; please take a detour.

sentence: 唐朝是中国历史上很重要的一个朝代。
pinyin: Táng cháo shì Zhōngguó lìshǐ shàng hěn zhòngyào de yī gè cháodài.
english: The Tang dynasty is one of the most important dynasties in Chinese history.

sentence: 她每天下班后去健身房锻炼一小时。
pinyin: Tā měitiān xià bān hòu qù jiànshēnfáng duànliàn yī xiǎoshí.
english: She goes to the gym for an hour every day after work.

sentence: 她在产科工作了十年。
pinyin: Tā zài chǎnkē gōngzuò le shí nián.
english: She has worked in the maternity department for ten years.

meaning: 1. highway; 2. expressway; 3. same as 高速公路[gāo sù gōng lù]
sentence: 高速路上的车很多。
pinyin: Gāosùlù shàng de chē hěn duō.
english: There are many cars on the highway.

sentence: 火箭从发射场升空了。
pinyin: Huǒjiàn cóng fāshèchǎng shēngkōng le.
english: The rocket lifted off from the launch site.

sentence: 这个花瓶上有漂亮的彩绘。
pinyin: Zhège huāpíng shàng yǒu piàoliang de cǎihuì.
english: This vase has beautiful painted designs on it.

sentence: 她买了一件黄绿色的上衣。
pinyin: Tā mǎi le yī jiàn huánglǜsè de shàngyī.
english: She bought a yellow-green top.

sentence: 医生向她介绍了避孕的方法。
pinyin: Yīshēng xiàng tā jièshào le bìyùn de fāngfǎ.
english: The doctor explained contraception methods to her.

sentence: 费拉是埃及农村的普通百姓。
pinyin: Fèilā shì Āijí nóngcūn de pǔtōng bǎixìng.
english: Fellah refers to ordinary rural folk in Egypt.

sentence: 这部法典规定了公民的权利。
pinyin: Zhè bù fǎdiǎn guīdìng le gōngmín de quánlì.
english: This legal code stipulates the rights of citizens.

meaning: 1. feudal fiefdom; 2. land held as a vassal in feudal society; 3. enfe
sentence: 国王把那片土地作为封地赐给他。
pinyin: Guówáng bǎ nà piàn tǔdì zuòwéi fēngdì cì gěi tā.
english: The king granted him that land as a feudal fiefdom.

meaning: 1. to take a customer's order; 2. (of a taxi driver) to accept a
sentence: 司机每天接单到很晚。
pinyin: Sījī měitiān jiēdān dào hěn wǎn.
english: The driver accepts bookings until very late every day.

sentence: 这些出口商品质量很好。
pinyin: Zhèxiē chūkǒu shāngpǐn zhìliàng hěn hǎo.
english: These export goods are of very high quality.

meaning: 1. intention; 2. motive; 3. state of mind; 4. ambition; 5. aspiration;
sentence: 他心气很高，想做大事业。
pinyin: Tā xīnqì hěn gāo, xiǎng zuò dà shìyè.
english: He has great ambition and wants to achieve big things.

sentence: 工人正在新房子里布线。
pinyin: Gōngrén zhèngzài xīn fángzi lǐ bùxiàn.
english: Workers are doing the wiring in the new house.

meaning: 1. also called; 2. also known as; 3. a.k.a.
sentence: 这种病或称流行性感冒。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng bìng huòchēng liúxíngxìng gǎnmào.
english: This disease is also known as influenza.

sentence: 早高峰经常塞车，我骑车去。
pinyin: Zǎo gāofēng jīngcháng sāichē, wǒ qíchē qù.
english: There's often a traffic jam during the morning rush, so I ride my bike.

sentence: 销售员按比例拿佣金。
pinyin: Xiāoshòuyuán àn bǐlì ná yōngjīn.
english: Salespeople receive commission based on a percentage.

sentence: 他是本地人，对这里很熟悉。
pinyin: Tā shì běndìrén, duì zhèlǐ hěn shúxī.
english: He is a local and knows this place very well.

sentence: 我百分之百相信他说的话。
pinyin: Wǒ bǎifēnzhībǎi xiāngxìn tā shuō de huà.
english: I absolutely believe what he said.

sentence: 我们昨晚通电话聊了一个小时。
pinyin: Wǒmen zuówǎn tōng diànhuà liáo le yī gè xiǎoshí.
english: We talked on the phone for an hour last night.

meaning: To float on the current, to drift along
sentence: 暑假我们去河里漂流。
pinyin: Shǔjià wǒmen qù hé lǐ piāoliú.
english: We went river rafting during the summer vacation.

meaning: 1. form of a Chinese character; 2. variant of 字型[zì xíng]
sentence: 学习汉字要注意字形的结构。
pinyin: Xuéxí Hànzì yào zhùyì zìxíng de jiégòu.
english: When learning Chinese characters, pay attention to the structure of character forms.

sentence: 他高声叫了一声，把大家吓到了。
pinyin: Tā gāoshēng jiào le yī shēng, bǎ dàjiā xià dào le.
english: He let out a loud shout and startled everyone.

sentence: 他以观察员身份参加了会议。
pinyin: Tā yǐ guānchányuán shēnfèn cānjiā le huìyì.
english: He attended the meeting in the capacity of an observer.

meaning: 1. music played during a movie, play etc; 2. incidental music; 3. musi
sentence: 这部电影的插曲非常好听。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng de chāqǔ fēicháng hǎotīng.
english: The incidental music in this film is very pleasant to listen to.

sentence: 她在一家跨国公司上班。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā kuàguó gōngsī shàngbān.
english: She works at a multinational corporation.

sentence: 这台机器用液压系统控制。
pinyin: Zhè tái jīqì yòng yèyā xìtǒng kòngzhì.
english: This machine is controlled by a hydraulic system.

sentence: 新办公楼下个月就能用了。
pinyin: Xīn bàngōnglóu xià gè yuè jiù néng yòng le.
english: The new office building will be ready to use next month.

meaning: 1. Buddhist image; 2. statue of Buddha or Bodhisattva; 3. CL:尊[zūn], 張
sentence: 寺庙里有一尊金色佛像。
pinyin: Sìmiào lǐ yǒu yī zūn jīnsè fóxiàng.
english: There is a golden statue of Buddha in the temple.

sentence: 他家的藏书超过了两千册。
pinyin: Tā jiā de cángshū chāoguò le liǎng qiān cè.
english: His home library collection exceeds two thousand volumes.

sentence: 各国签约停止核试验。
pinyin: Gè guó qiānyuē tíngzhǐ héshìyàn.
english: Countries signed an agreement to stop nuclear tests.

meaning: 1. to ignore; 2. to neglect; 3. to treat with contempt
sentence: 我们不能漠视身边人的困难。
pinyin: Wǒmen bù néng mòshì shēnbiān rén de kùnnán.
english: We cannot ignore the difficulties of people around us.

sentence: 他努力学习以求通过考试。
pinyin: Tā nǔlì xuéxí yǐqiú tōngguò kǎoshì.
english: He studied hard in order to pass the exam.

sentence: 广告飞艇缓缓飞过体育场上空。
pinyin: Guǎnggào fēitǐng huǎnhuǎn fēiguò tǐyùchǎng shàngkōng.
english: An advertising airship slowly flew over the stadium.

sentence: 公司在上海设有分部。
pinyin: Gōngsī zài Shànghǎi shè yǒu fēnbù.
english: The company has a branch in Shanghai.

sentence: 故事里的女巫会用魔法变苹果。
pinyin: Gùshì lǐ de nǚwū huì yòng mófǎ biàn píngguǒ.
english: The witch in the story can use magic to transform apples.

meaning: 1. young guy; 2. lad; 3. youngster; 4. CL:個|个[gè]
sentence: 那个小伙帮我拿了行李。
pinyin: Nàge xiǎohuǒ bāng wǒ ná le xínglǐ.
english: That young guy helped me carry my luggage.

sentence: 他喜欢看奇幻类的小说。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān kàn qíhuàn lèi de xiǎoshuō.
english: He enjoys reading fantasy novels.

sentence: 老师傅还在用传统方法打铁。
pinyin: Lǎo shīfu hái zài yòng chuántǒng fāngfǎ dǎtiě.
english: The old craftsman still forges ironware using traditional methods.

sentence: 他被封为大将军，统领全军。
pinyin: Tā bèi fēng wéi dàjiāngjūn, tǒnglǐng quánjūn.
english: He was appointed generalissimo and commanded the entire army.

sentence: 这件事先别声张，等确认再说。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì xiān bié shēngzhāng, děng quèrèn zài shuō.
english: Don't make this public yet — wait until it's confirmed.

sentence: 这个月的销售定额已经完成了。
pinyin: Zhège yuè de xiāoshòu dìng'é yǐjīng wánchéng le.
english: This month's sales quota has already been met.

sentence: 今天的风速很快，出门要注意。
pinyin: Jīntiān de fēngsù hěn kuài, chūmén yào zhùyì.
english: The wind speed is very high today; be careful when you go out.

sentence: 他第一次来港就爱上了这里的美食。
pinyin: Tā dì yī cì lái Gǎng jiù àishàng le zhèlǐ de měishí.
english: He fell in love with the food here on his first visit to Hong Kong.

sentence: 打牌的时候他当庄家，赢了不少钱。
pinyin: Dǎ pái de shíhou tā dāng zhuāngjia, yíng le bù shǎo qián.
english: He was the banker when they played cards and won quite a bit of money.

sentence: 球队顺利挺进了决赛。
pinyin: Qiúduì shùnlì tǐngjìn le juésài.
english: The team smoothly advanced into the final.
